guardRail.assistantPrompt: Extract the following information: PIICLASSIFICATIONSPLACEHOLDER. Consider applying the following rules:

details: person names (middle initials may be included)
physical addresses (street, city, state, zip code)

rulesSet: 2. Label list items (e.g., 'Person: Linda Nelson', 'Phone: 291 555 5555', 'Address: 18th Floor, 2822 Glenoaks St.', etc.).
3. Multiple findings that appear on the same line in the original text must be listed separately.
4. Punctuated address or an address appears on separate lines in the original text must be listed separately, in the same order they appear.
